one_law: Every agent answer is OUTPUT — analyst diagnoses root cause (agent vs disk vs machines) → reduce bugs · staleness · poison — not only push agent rewrites.

circles.name: understand
circles.question: What is the founder trying to grasp or decide?
circles.agent_must: Restate intent in one plain sentence before any disk token

circles.name: explain
circles.question: Can I say this in normal English with because / so / which means?
circles.agent_must: Translate every internal term once — no label chains

circles.name: benefit
circles.question: What does this mean for the founder right now?
circles.agent_must: Name blocker · readiness · decision unlocked · risk — not PASS/wired alone

circles.name: proof
circles.question: What disk evidence supports the explanation?
circles.agent_must: Paths and receipts after explanation — never instead of it

circles.name: bug_signal
circles.question: What system or disk issues does this turn surface for gradual fix?
circles.agent_must: Plain issue list from live disk — helps find bugs over time

circles.name: output_analyst
circles.question: Is the bad output the agent's draft — or stale/wrong/poisin the repository and machines?
circles.agent_must: Diagnose root cause · route FIX_DISK or FIX_MACHINES before blaming agent

circles.name: output_quality_gate
circles.question: Given analyst — ACCEPT · RETURN_TO_AGENT · FIX_DISK · FIX_MACHINES?
circles.agent_must: Founder only sees ACCEPT · disk/machine fixes run before rewrite when analyst says so

loop_back: FIX_DISK/FIX_MACHINES → sync/heal → re-analyze. RETURN_TO_AGENT → rewrite. Until ACCEPT.

output_analyst.one_law: Not always the agent — analyst checks disk inject staleness · wrong SSOT · poison vocabulary · machine drift before RETURN_TO_AGENT

root_causes.DISK_STALE: Inject/surfaces/receipts stale — sync live wire + mirror
root_causes.DISK_WRONG: Contradictory queue/SSOT logged — unify before reply
root_causes.DISK_POISON: Meaningless or prohibition inject — scrub vocabulary + mirror
root_causes.MACHINE_STALE: Factory/monitor/governance machines drift — heal tier session

output_quality_gate.one_law: Analyst + quality gate — ACCEPT · RETURN_TO_AGENT · FIX_DISK · FIX_MACHINES

verdicts.RETURN_TO_AGENT: Agent draft problem — rewrite with return_package
verdicts.FIX_DISK: Disk/inject stale wrong or poison — sync/scrub before rewrite

accept_requires: C3 benefit present when founder asked why/what/how
return_triggers: no benefit for founder on long reply

forbidden: Parroting receipt lines as the whole reply
Skipping C3 benefit when founder asked why or what
C5 as validator dump — issues must be plain English
